title: Janette Elbertson
compiled_truth: Janette Elbertson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-06), Janette Elbertson sent 258 and received 1106 emails, totalling 1364 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (97), [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (94), [Richard Sanders](people/richard-sanders) (92), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (90), [Julia Murray](people/julia-murray) (89). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, calendar, deleted_items, inbox, outlook_migration, sent.
